### [MarkdownRange](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/reference/fsharp-formatting-markdown-markdownrangemodule.html)

MarkdownRange 
 Helper functions for working with <see cref="MarkdownRange"/> values 
MarkdownRange.zero 
zero 
MarkdownRange.mergeRanges 
mergeRanges

### [MarkdownRange.zero](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/reference/fsharp-formatting-markdown-markdownrangemodule.html#zero)

MarkdownRange.zero 
zero 
 A zero range used as a default/placeholder when no real range is available

### [MarkdownRange.mergeRanges](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/reference/fsharp-formatting-markdown-markdownrangemodule.html#mergeRanges)

MarkdownRange.mergeRanges 
mergeRanges 
 Merges a list of ranges into one spanning range that covers all of them

### [MarkdownRange](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/reference/fsharp-formatting-markdown-markdownrange.html)

MarkdownRange 
 Represents a source range in a Markdown document, identified by start and end line/column positions.
 Used to track where each parsed element originated in the source text. 
MarkdownRange.StartLine 
StartLine 
MarkdownRange.StartColumn 
StartColumn 
MarkdownRange.EndLine 
EndLine 
MarkdownRange.EndColumn 
EndColumn

### [MarkdownRange.StartLine](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/reference/fsharp-formatting-markdown-markdownrange.html#StartLine)

MarkdownRange.StartLine 
StartLine 
 The 1-based line number where the element starts

### [MarkdownRange.StartColumn](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/reference/fsharp-formatting-markdown-markdownrange.html#StartColumn)

MarkdownRange.StartColumn 
StartColumn 
 The 0-based column index where the element starts

### [MarkdownRange.EndLine](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/reference/fsharp-formatting-markdown-markdownrange.html#EndLine)

MarkdownRange.EndLine 
EndLine 
 The 1-based line number where the element ends

### [MarkdownRange.EndColumn](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/reference/fsharp-formatting-markdown-markdownrange.html#EndColumn)

MarkdownRange.EndColumn 
EndColumn 
 The 0-based column index where the element ends

### [ParamKeys](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/reference/fsharp-formatting-templating-paramkeys.html)

ParamKeys 
  Defines the parameter keys known to FSharp.Formatting processing code 
ParamKeys.root 
root 
ParamKeys.``fsdocs-authors`` 
``fsdocs-authors``

``fsdocs-collection-name``

### [ParamKeys.``fsdocs-menu-header-active-class``](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/reference/fsharp-formatting-templating-paramkeys.html#``fsdocs-menu-header-active-class``)

ParamKeys.``fsdocs-menu-header-active-class`` 
``fsdocs-menu-header-active-class`` 
 A parameter key known to FSharp.Formatting, available in _menu_template.html
 This will be an empty string if the category is not active.

 /// This will be an empty string if the item is not active.

### [ParamKeys.``fsdocs-previous-page-link``](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/reference/fsharp-formatting-templating-paramkeys.html#``fsdocs-previous-page-link``)

ParamKeys.``fsdocs-previous-page-link`` 
``fsdocs-previous-page-link`` 
 A parameter key known to FSharp.Formatting, available when frontmatter is used correctly

### [ParamKeys.``fsdocs-next-page-link``](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/reference/fsharp-formatting-templating-paramkeys.html#``fsdocs-next-page-link``)

ParamKeys.``fsdocs-next-page-link`` 
``fsdocs-next-page-link`` 
 A parameter key known to FSharp.Formatting, available when frontmatter is used correctly

### [ParamKeys.``fsdocs-head-extra``](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/reference/fsharp-formatting-templating-paramkeys.html#``fsdocs-head-extra``)

ParamKeys.``fsdocs-head-extra`` 
``fsdocs-head-extra`` 
 A parameter key known to FSharp.Formatting, available when `_head.html` exists in the input folder.

### [ParamKeys.``fsdocs-body-extra``](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/reference/fsharp-formatting-templating-paramkeys.html#``fsdocs-body-extra``)

ParamKeys.``fsdocs-body-extra`` 
``fsdocs-body-extra`` 
 A parameter key known to FSharp.Formatting, available when `_head.html` exists in the input folder.

### [ParamKeys.``fsdocs-body-class``](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/reference/fsharp-formatting-templating-paramkeys.html#``fsdocs-body-class``)

ParamKeys.``fsdocs-body-class`` 
``fsdocs-body-class`` 
 A parameter key known to FSharp.Formatting, either 'content' or 'api-doc'
 Mean to be used on the `class` attribute in the `<body>` tag.
 This helps to differentiate styles between API docs and custom content.

### [ParamKeys.``fsdocs-meta-tags``](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/reference/fsharp-formatting-templating-paramkeys.html#``fsdocs-meta-tags``)

ParamKeys.``fsdocs-meta-tags`` 
``fsdocs-meta-tags`` 
 A parameter key known to FSharp.Formatting, it is HTML composed from additional frontmatter information.
 Such as tags and description
 This can be empty when both properties are not provided for the current page.

### [FrontMatterFile](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/reference/fsharp-formatting-templating-frontmatterfile.html)

FrontMatterFile 
 Meta data from files that contains front matter
 Used to determine upfront which files have front matter so that previous and next substitutes can be discovered. 
FrontMatterFile.ParseFromLines 
ParseFromLines 
FrontMatterFile.FileName 
FileName 
FrontMatterFile.Category 
Category 
FrontMatterFile.CategoryIndex 
CategoryIndex 
FrontMatterFile.Index 
Index

### [FrontMatterFile.ParseFromLines](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/reference/fsharp-formatting-templating-frontmatterfile.html#ParseFromLines)

FrontMatterFile.ParseFromLines 
ParseFromLines 
 Parses the category, categoryindex and index from the frontmatter lines

### [FrontMatterFile.FileName](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/reference/fsharp-formatting-templating-frontmatterfile.html#FileName)

FrontMatterFile.FileName 
FileName

### [FrontMatterFile.Category](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/reference/fsharp-formatting-templating-frontmatterfile.html#Category)

FrontMatterFile.Category 
Category

### [FrontMatterFile.CategoryIndex](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/reference/fsharp-formatting-templating-frontmatterfile.html#CategoryIndex)

FrontMatterFile.CategoryIndex 
CategoryIndex

### [FrontMatterFile.Index](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/reference/fsharp-formatting-templating-frontmatterfile.html#Index)

FrontMatterFile.Index 
Index

### [Substitutions](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/reference/fsharp-formatting-templating-substitutions.html)

Substitutions

Substitutions.Item 
Item 
Substitutions.Tail 
Tail

IsEmpty

Head

Length 
Substitutions.Empty
